_comment: Frozen coverage floor (fleet T1 ratchet, Issue #277; payout #241 型). Shrink-only: coverage-ratchet.mjs fails CI if any metric drops below these values. Raise these numbers when coverage improves; never lower them. Regenerate the measurement with `npm run coverage`. 2026-07-21 (#284): re-baselined after the shared/ui i18n decouple — components now take resolved strings as props (structural shift) and a new AppChrome adapter (widgets) is covered by AppChrome.test.tsx. Functions/branches rose (locked in); statements/lines shifted down ~0.1 from the prop-threading restructure, not from untested logic. Denominator moved 774->771 stmt / 750->747 lines.
